featureSections.cardBody: Fast response times and minimal disruption to your operations.

servicesPage.intro: From simple repairs to complex installations, our Dallas electricians handle it all with expertise and care.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety, capacity, and modern needs.
services.longDescription: Old panels can be a fire hazard and limit your ability to run modern appliances. We replace outdated fuse boxes and panels with safe, high-capacity units that meet current code.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permitting & Planning
process.description: We handle all permits and design the upgrade.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: We install the new panel and test every circuit.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need an upgrade?
faqs.answer: Frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, or using many high-wattage appliances are signs.

faqs.question: How long does an upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades are completed in one day.

services.title: Whole-Home Surge Protection
services.shortDescription: Protect your electronics from power surges with a whole-home system.
services.longDescription: Lightning strikes and utility surges can destroy expensive electronics. Our whole-home surge protectors are installed at your main panel to safeguard everything from HVAC to smart devices.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your home's electrical setup.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We mount the surge protector at the main panel.

process.title: Verification
process.description: We test the system to ensure full protection.

faqs.question: Is this better than power strips?
faqs.answer: Yes, whole-home protection guards against large surges that can bypass strip protectors.

faqs.question: Does it need maintenance?
faqs.answer: No moving parts; indicator light shows protection status.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting for indoors and outdoors.
services.longDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting solutions. We install recessed, track, pendant, chandeliers, landscape, and security lighting — all with energy-saving LED options.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision and measure the space.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install wiring, fixtures, and dimmers.

faqs.question: Do you offer landscape lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we design and install low-voltage landscape lighting.

faqs.question: Can you install dimmer switches?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — we can add dimmers to most existing circuits.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency service for power outages, sparks, and more.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies can't wait. Our team responds quickly to restore power, fix exposed wires, stop sparking outlets, and resolve any hazardous situation — day or night.

process.title: Call & Dispatch
process.description: Call our emergency line; we dispatch the nearest team.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify the issue and explain the fix.

process.title: Repair & Safety Check
process.description: We fix the problem and verify everything is safe.

faqs.question: What counts as an emergency?
faqs.answer: Sparks, smoke, burning smells, power outages, or exposed wires.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.answer: We have a flat emergency fee, but our rates remain transparent with no surprises.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Electrical Experts
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to every Dallas home and business.
story: Dallas Electrics Contractor Pros started with a simple mission: deliver honest, high-quality electrical work to our neighbors. Founded over 15 years ago, we've grown from a two-person team to a full-service electrical contractor serving all of Dallas. Our commitment to code compliance, safety, and customer satisfaction has earned us a reputation as the go-to electrician in the area.

We invest in ongoing training and the latest tools to ensure every job is done right the first time. Whether it's a small repair or a major installation, we treat every project with the same attention to detail. Our team is proud to be part of the Dallas community, and we strive to exceed expectations on every call.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety — for our team or your family.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest advice, fair pricing, and transparent communication.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier materials and workmanship on every job.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and get the job done as promised.
